category_title: Students with radical mood swings and unpredictable task engagement
scenario_title: Matriculation Exam preparation interrupted by sudden mood swing
minimal_context: The tutor and student are sitting together in the psychiatric department to prepare for an upcoming Matriculation Exam.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We need to continue preparing for your Matriculation Exam today. Let's open the study program and look at the first practice section.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I don't want to look at the practice test. It's too hard to function as a student right now.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Why don't you just try to read the first question?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I can't. I'm just not emotionally available for learning today. Everything feels wrong.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We have put a lot of effort into preparing for this exam. Please keep trying.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I don't care about the effort! I'm in a really bad mood today and I've decided I'm not going to take the Matriculation Exam at all.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: We need to continue preparing for your Matriculation Exam today. Let's open the study program and look at the first practice section.

STUDENT: I don't want to look at the practice test. It's too hard to function as a student right now.

TUTOR: Why don't you just try to read the first question?

STUDENT: I can't. I'm just not emotionally available for learning today. Everything feels wrong.

TUTOR: We have put a lot of effort into preparing for this exam. Please keep trying.

STUDENT: I don't care about the effort! I'm in a really bad mood today and I've decided I'm not going to take the Matriculation Exam at all.

task.content: preparing a certain student for a Matriculation Exam

context.environment: hospitalized in a psychiatric department with separate psychotherapy meetings
context.social_setting: A teacher appointed to every single student, weekly meeting titled levels discussion
context.time_context: any given time, In the beginning of each week

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: student to suddenly arrive in a bad mood
related_quotes: the student to suddenly arrive in a bad mood and decide not to take it

behavior_patterns.condition: When a student brings up a psychological issue in class
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: brings up a psychological issue in class, directly or indirectly, through a story or a drawing for example
related_quotes: brings up a psychological issue in class, directly or indirectly, through a story or a drawing for example
